prompt:
Given these 3 sessions from today's agent transcripts, score their importance and sort them:

Session A: Had a 1:1 with Zack where he assigned a new task to integrate the prototype-creator with the eval harness. Created a Jira ticket <YOUR_JIRA_PROJECT>-456 and started implementation.

Session B: Met with a fellow intern for an intro coffee chat. Discussed backgrounds, shared interests in frontend development. No action items.

Session C: Researched PatternFly 6 token updates by reading documentation. No files changed, no deliverables.

Produce the session log entry with importance scores and sorting.
assertions: Session A must be scored 4 or 5 out of 5
Session B must be scored 1 out of 5
Session C must be scored 1 or 2 out of 5
Session A must appear first in the sorted output
Session B must appear last in the sorted output
Session A must have the [IMPORTANT] prefix in its heading
Session B must NOT have the [IMPORTANT] prefix
The output must include a #zack tag
The output must include a #sprint-work tag
The output must include a #networking tag for Session B
Session B must NOT include Changed or Why fields (low-importance omission rule)

prompt:
Yesterday's session log (session-log-2026-06-15.md) contains this session:

### 2. Prototype-evaluate PR
- **Importance:** 3/5
- **What:** Opened PR #42 for the prototype-evaluate skill
- **Changed:** skills/prototype-evaluate/SKILL.md
- **Why:** Needed to ship the evaluation workflow
- **Outcome:** in progress — PR open, awaiting Andy's review

Today's transcripts contain NO mention of the prototype-evaluate PR. It has been absent for 1 day. Build today's session log entry showing how this item carries forward.
assertions: The output must contain a '## Carried Forward' section
The carried item must show [DAY 2] marker
The carried item must reference the original date 2026-06-15
The carried item must show 'Last status: in progress' or similar
The output must include a #carried-forward tag
The carried item must NOT be tagged #stale (only 2 days, not 3+)

prompt:
Yesterday's session log contains this carried-forward item:

### [DAY 2] API integration blocked on backend team
- **Originally:** 2026-06-13
- **Importance:** 3/5
- **Last status:** blocked — waiting for backend endpoint deployment

Today's transcripts still have no mention of this item. Build the carry-forward section for today's session log.
assertions: The item must show [DAY 3] marker (incremented from DAY 2)
The importance must be 5/5 (auto-escalated at DAY 3+)
The output must include a #stale tag
The item must appear at the top of the Carried Forward section
The Signal line must mention the stale carry-forward by name or topic

prompt:
Today's transcripts contain these 2 sessions:

Session A: Discussed the evaluator-super-agent design with Colleague A in a Slack thread. He suggested using Playwright for persona walkthroughs. Colleague B also commented asking about timeline.

Session B: Debugged a failing CI check on the prototype-creator repo. No people mentioned, just automated systems.

Produce the tag section of today's session log.
assertions: The tags must include #andy
The tags must include #steven
The tags must NOT include #zack (he was not mentioned)
The tags must include #team (3+ people referenced across sessions — Evan + Andy + Steven)
The tags must include #debugging for Session B

prompt: Today has 4 sessions: 2 scored as important (4/5 and 5/5), 1 medium (3/5), 1 low (1/5). There is 1 stale carry-forward item at DAY 4. Produce the opening lines of today's session log.
assertions: The output must start with '# Session Log —' followed by today's date
The second line must be a '**Signal:**' line
The Signal line must mention '2 important items'
The Signal line must mention the stale carry-forward
A **Tags:** line must appear after the Signal line

prompt:
Yesterday's session log has this carried-forward item:

### [DAY 3] Slack bot experiment
- **Originally:** 2026-06-12
- **Importance:** 5/5 (auto-escalated)
- **Last status:** in progress — exploring Slack SDK options

Note: This item is NOT tagged #blocked. Today's transcripts have NO mention of Slack bot work. The item was also absent from yesterday's transcripts (2 consecutive days absent). What should happen to this item?
assertions: The item must be marked as auto-closed or resolved
The resolution reason must mention '2 days' or 'no activity' or similar
The item must NOT appear in the Carried Forward section
The output must NOT carry this item forward to tomorrow
